Package egovframework.let.cop.com.service

Class BoardUseInfVO

java.lang.Object

egovframework.let.cop.com.service.BoardUseInfVO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class BoardUseInfVO extends BoardUseInf implements Serializable

1.0
